title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 12 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 12 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 12 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day, the main contract closed 827. an increase of 0.3% throughout the day;some traders according to market conditions. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
